items.name: TC_Pet_Portal_025 - Verify the "Reschedule" button is displayed for appointments more than 48 hours away and allows the appointment to be rescheduled successfully.
TC_Pet_Portal_043_048- Verify the Appointments tab displays upcoming appointments correctly
TC_Pet_Portal_017_018 - Verify "My Preferred Clinic" Information and Verify Remove Preferred Clinic

TC_Pet_Portal_021_022_026 - Verify the Appointments tab displays upcoming appointments correctly and The "Cancel" button is displayed for appointments and "clicking View Appointment History" will navigate to Appointments section in Portal
TC_Pet_Portal_006 - Verify "Book Online" is shown for clinics that allow booking and opens the booking pop-up when clicked
TC_Pet_Portal_069 - Verify changing communication preference toggles updates the status correctly to Vetspire & Iterable
TC_Pet_Portal_002 - Verify the clinic link opens the preferred clinic left panel
TC_WhiskerDocs_010 - Verify If the user is not logged in, the system prompts the user to log in --> After logging in, the user will go to Helpline Powered by WhiskerDocs.
TC_Pet_Portal_025 - Verify the "Reschedule" button is not displayed for appointments equal or less than 48 hours away
